item.title: Maritime insurers cancel war risk cover in Gulf: Will it spike energy cost?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Insurers announced they were cancelling war risk coverage after the IRGC said the Strait of Hormuz was 'closed'.
Matched: war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Israeli ground incursion into Lebanon as front boils over amid wider war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Hezbollah says Israel wanted open war, 'so let it be an open war', adding that 'the era of patience has ended.'
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: UN chief warns of Israeli-made humanitarian crisis in Gaza amid war on Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Crossings have been shut since Saturday as the displaced population of Gaza remains dependent on humanitarian aid.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Iran mourns 165 girls, staff killed in school strike during US-Israel war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Attack in southern Iran that hit civilians was the deadliest of the US-Israeli war against Tehran so far.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: ‘Trump didn’t follow legal proceedings to launch this war’
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
'Trump left all options open for when he would be bored with this to decide it's done and find a way to declare victory'
Matched: war(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: US claims destroyed IRGC command centre, more Israel attacks on Tehran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
The US Central Command (CENTCOM) says it destroyed air defence installations as well as missile and drone launch sites.
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: US sanctions Rwandan army and top officials for supporting M23 in DRC
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Kinshasa welcomed the sanctions while Kigali said the US move 'unjustly' targets Rwanda.
Matched: sanctions(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: How Russia could benefit from the US-Israeli war on Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
A protracted conflict in the Middle East could help Russia's war effort in Ukraine.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: As bombing continues, Israel’s war aim in Iran becomes clear: Regime change
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Israel aims for regime change in Iran, but may not care as much about whether the transition is smooth.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)
